next_steps: Send stool sample for Clostridium botulinum toxin assay and culture
Consult pediatric neurology for repetitive nerve stimulation study
Consider early administration of Botulism Immune Globulin (BIG-IV) based on clinical suspicion
Avoid use of aminoglycoside antibiotics and magnesium-containing medications
Maintain high-level respiratory support and monitor for autonomic instability
Detailed history regarding honey or environmental exposures to dust/soil
